---
title: "Projects"
description: "Selected applied optimization projects in energy systems and urban operations."
toc: false
---

::: {.project-safe-note}
Only **public-safe** evidence is presented. Figures were curated from deployment reports and interfaces after removing sensitive materials (e.g., signatures, contract IDs, personal handwriting).
:::

## Deployment Evidence Snapshot

::: {.project-hero-grid}
<div class="project-figure-card">
<img src="/assets/images/projects/power/thermal_process_overview.png" alt="Energy-system optimization interface overview">
<p><strong>Energy System:</strong> Operation interface for closed-loop optimization.</p>
<p class="project-figure-caption-cn">中文图注：火电机组能效闭环主界面，展示关键工况、锅炉状态与执行量。</p>
</div>

<div class="project-figure-card">
<img src="/assets/images/projects/water/water_dispatch_dashboard.png" alt="Urban operations scheduling dashboard in daily use">
<p><strong>Urban Operations:</strong> Scheduling dashboard in daily operation.</p>
<p class="project-figure-caption-cn">中文图注：一厂两站智慧供水调度主界面，展示区域压力、指令执行与监测点状态。</p>
</div>
:::

::: {.project-metric-chips}
<div class="project-metric-chip"><span class="k">Power Result</span><span class="v">Coal use reduced by <strong>1.2 g/kWh</strong> at ~50% load</span></div>
<div class="project-metric-chip"><span class="k">Power Result</span><span class="v">Coal use reduced by <strong>3-6 g/kWh</strong> at 20%/40% load</span></div>
<div class="project-metric-chip"><span class="k">Water Result</span><span class="v">Peak energy reduction around <strong>10%</strong></span></div>
<div class="project-metric-chip"><span class="k">Water Result</span><span class="v">Pump switching reduction around <strong>20%</strong></span></div>
<div class="project-metric-chip"><span class="k">Water Result</span><span class="v">Pressure compliance improved by around <strong>3%</strong></span></div>
<div class="project-metric-chip"><span class="k">Forecast Evidence</span><span class="v">Pressure forecasting examples with low MAPE</span></div>
:::

## Cross-domain Results at a Glance

::: {.two-col-grid}
::: {.feature-card}
#### Energy-System Deployment
- Closed-loop optimization and operating-strategy support integrated into daily operation.
- Multi-load evidence reported at 20%, 40%, and 50% operating points.
- Interface-level diagnostics used for operator-facing review and staged validation.
:::
::: {.feature-card}
#### Urban Operations Deployment
- One-plant-two-stations scheduling and monitoring in continuous operation mode.
- Data-driven forecasting + dispatch framework deployed with constraint configuration workflow.
- Score-based operation evaluation and dashboard-based decision support online.
:::
:::

## Selected Deployments

::: {.card-list}
::: {.entry-card}
#### [Energy-System Efficiency Optimization](power-closed-loop-efficiency.qmd)
- Domain: Energy
- Role: Project Lead
- Status: Deployed
:::
::: {.entry-card}
#### [Urban Operations Scheduling and Decision Support](water-pump-scheduling.qmd)
- Domain: Water
- Role: Algorithm Lead
- Status: Deployed
:::
:::

## Engineering Principles Across Projects

- Constraint-aware reliability first (feasible-set tightening + staged protection logic).
- Decoupled train/inference/optimization/release architecture.
- Configuration-driven deployment with staged validation and replay checks.
- Operator-facing observability (alerts, dashboards, and logs).
